title: DoorDash Delivery
description: Represents a delivery fulfilled by DoorDash's fleet of Dashers, including pickup and dropoff details, status tracking, and Dasher assignment information.

external_delivery_id.description: A unique identifier for this delivery, provided by the caller.

delivery_status.description: The current status of the delivery as it progresses through the lifecycle.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for monetary amounts.

order_value.description: The total value of the order in cents.

pickup_address.description: The full street address for the pickup location.

pickup_business_name.description: The business name at the pickup location.

pickup_phone_number.description: The phone number at the pickup location.

pickup_instructions.description: Special instructions for the Dasher at the pickup location.

pickup_reference_tag.description: A reference tag for the pickup, such as an order number.

pickup_time_estimated.description: The estimated pickup time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

pickup_time_actual.description: The actual pickup time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

dropoff_address.description: The full street address for the dropoff location.

dropoff_business_name.description: The business name at the dropoff location.

dropoff_phone_number.description: The phone number of the recipient at the dropoff location.

dropoff_instructions.description: Special instructions for the Dasher at the dropoff location.

dropoff_contact_given_name.description: The first name of the dropoff contact.

dropoff_contact_family_name.description: The last name of the dropoff contact.

dropoff_time_estimated.description: The estimated dropoff time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

dropoff_time_actual.description: The actual dropoff time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

contains_alcohol.description: Whether the order contains alcohol, requiring age verification.

force_batch_id.description: An identifier to group deliveries for batch assignment to the same Dasher.

tracking_url.description: A URL for tracking the delivery in real time.

items.description: List of items included in the delivery.

external_business_id.description: The external business ID associated with this delivery.

external_store_id.description: The external store ID associated with this delivery.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the delivery was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the delivery was last updated.

Dasher.description: Information about the Dasher assigned to fulfill the delivery.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Dasher.

name.description: The first name of the Dasher.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the Dasher.

DeliveryItem.description: An item included in a delivery.

external_id.description: An external identifier for the item.

price.description: The price of the item in cents.
